calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-30-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge: Herbert Donalson, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR: Lavon Granger
Petitioner,Aubrey Elizabeth Taylor present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for 1)change of name to Jack Xander Taylor, 2) Change of Gender from Female to Male
Decree signed in open court.
